titleStmt.title: SII 31.124: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 124. (A.R. No. B 289 of 1936.) KUṀKANŪRU, PATTIKONDA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the well called Mādireḍḍibhāvi to the west of the village.
It is dated Śaka 148[4], Sidhārtha, Bhādrapada, śu. 11, Irregular.

It records the conversion of a gift well into a dharma ētāmu by the sons of Kaṁkanūri Vobayya of Aśvalāyanasūtra and Gautama gōtra (probably for use of public) and also registers the gift of land in the cyclic year Naḷa probably for maintaining the dharmaētāmu for the merit of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Pina Śrī Raṁgarāju. The gift village is stated to have been situated in the nāyaṁkara of Tēkaṁṭikōṭa. The Tēkaṁṭikōṭa is stated to have been given as amaranāyaṁkara to Timmarāju, the son of Pinaśrī Raṁgarāju by Sadāśivadēvamahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavaruśa(ṣa)ṁbulu 1484 sidhā(ddhā)ti saṁvatsara bhādrapada śu 11 lu
śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēsva(śva)ra śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsivadēva
mahārāyalugāru prutvi(pṛdhvī)rājyamu sēyagānu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara
pina śrīraṁgarājukōmāruṁḍu tiṁmmarājugāruki Amaranā
maṁkarānaku pāliṁcina tēkaṁṭikōṭa sīmaku jellē kuṁkanū
rigrāmāna rukhuśākā(khā)dhyāyilayina gaUtamu (gautama) gōtramu Āsva(śva)lāyana
sūtrulayina kaṁkanūristaḷa vōbayya koḍukulu
tavviṁcina bhāvini dharmmaĒtamu peṭiṁci naṁduku sarvamānyamugānu
tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu śrīniṭalēśvaruni saṁnnidhinila pinaśrīraṁ
garājugāriki Akṣaya puṇyaṁ saṁprā palenu Ani dāna
nimittamugānu prāku(māku) naḷa saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa mā
samaṁdu dhāravōsi yicinadi . Akaliseṭi yeṟanēla 1
caramula yeṟasōṭlareḍivāri rēgaṭistaḷamuṁdu bīḍupo
laṁ bījavari 1 Ubhayaṁ yēdamu pōlamunnu dhāra dhārasa
tamugānu trivācakamugānu dhāravōsi dhāravōsi yistimi yī
naku yevaru tapinānu gōvubrāhmani vāraṇāsilōnu vadhiyiṁci
nadōṣānapōduru . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrījēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 31.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
